His research centers on the psychology underlying personal misbeliefs and social misunderstandings. \n\nThe title of his presentation was \"Why Do Fools Think They Are Wise? Should the Wise Believe Themselves to be the Fool?\" The presentation was followed by conversation between Dunning and Laurie Patton, the president of the Academy. \n\nAt this event, he delved into research that shows people tend to hold flattering opinions of their competence, character, and prospects that cannot be justified from objective evidence.
